author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
## Findings

Reject newlines (`\n`, `\r`), null bytes (`\0`), and any other
`char::is_control` codepoint (tabs included) on title write. Land
site: `crates/jjf-storage/src/lib.rs:512` (`pub fn
validate_title`); reasons enum at `:447` (`TitleInvalidReason`);
error variant at `:165` (`Error::InvalidTitle`). All three storage
mutators (`create_issue`, `set_title`, `update`) delegate to it.

CLI surface: `CliError::InvalidTitle` mirrors `InvalidSlug` (exit 2,
`invalid_title` kind, `details.{title,reason,codepoint?}`). CLI
pre-validates at the boundary in `run_new` and `run_update` so the
operator sees the typed envelope before any IO. Storage re-validates
for defense in depth — covers the case where a programmatic caller
(Python, MCP) can pass a `\0` that POSIX argv strips before bash
ever reaches `jjf`.

Pinned with 8 storage tests (`crates/jjf-storage/tests/integration.rs`)
and 5 CLI integration tests (`crates/jjf/tests/title_validation.rs`).
`docs/cli-json.md` documents the kind with the four reasons and the
`codepoint` envelope key.

`cargo nextest run --workspace`: 400/400 green. (One pre-existing
parallel-claim test was flaky on the first attempt and passed on
re-run; unrelated to this change.) Commit `4aa787f`.

## Recommendation

Merge as-is and unblock `cc2fa96 host-asterinas-migrate`. The
asterinas tree carries hand-written prose titles up to ~200 chars
that this guard now keeps safe end-to-end.

## Confidence

high. The four-reason rejection model matches the issue spec
exactly; the CLI envelope shape mirrors `invalid_slug` precedent;
storage and CLI layers each have their own tests so neither can
regress silently.

## Open follow-ups

- Title length cap (issue body marks out of scope; ~200-char
  asterinas titles fit comfortably under a 500-char prior-art
  limit from beads). File when an operator hits it.
- POSIX argv truncates `\0` before `jjf` sees it — the CLI test
  for `--title $'a\x00b'` is intentionally absent, with the
  reasoning captured in the comment block at
  `crates/jjf/tests/title_validation.rs:107`. The `null_byte`
  reason path remains exercised through the storage layer.
